name: legacy_sync
description: Legacy-sync red-line (§9.3 / §11): a legacy memory managed by a dead (effective-expired) claim drops out of the prompt-injection candidate set, while an unlinked memory stays injectable.

claims.content: The user is on the rotation-old on-call schedule.
